title: Out-of-Network Copay & Preventative Care Form
introHtml: Before submitting, confirm your expenses meet the Member Guidelines. Do not submit multiple requests for the same bills.

fields.name: field_mpe78oaf2fnd19ct8
fields.label: I agree to the terms and conditions
fields.termsHtml:
Before submitting, review the Member Guidelines to make sure your expenses qualify for sharing, and gather all related bills and documentation. See the FAQs if you have questions.

If you've already submitted a request for this medical event, do not submit another one. Send additional documents to your existing request instead — duplicate submissions for the same bills slow everything down.

fields.name: ay_member_id
fields.label: ShareWell member ID
fields.helperText: Enter the member ID from your ID card.

fields.name: close_auth_heading
fields.label: Authorization heading
fields.contentHtml:
Authorization to obtain or release medical information

Please read the authorizations below, then enter your name and sign.

fields.name: close_phi_terms
fields.label: I have read and agree to the authorization above
fields.termsHtml:
Authorization to Obtain or Release Medical Information

Protected Health Information (PHI) to be Used and/or Disclosed: Any and all information or records relating to the medical history, medical examinations, services rendered, or treatment given, including treatment for alcohol abuse, substance abuse, mental or emotional disorders, A.I.D.S. (Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndrome), or A.R.C (AIDS-related complex). Entities or Persons

Authorized to Use or Disclose: U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (including the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services and any contractors or agents, including Medicare intermediaries), any physician or other health care professional, hospital or other health care facility, counselor, therapist or any other medical or medically related facility or professional. Entities or Persons Authorized to Receive: ShareWELL Health Share or its agents, employees, designees, or representatives, including my ShareWELL agent or broker.

Purpose of this Authorization: By signing this form, you will authorize ShareWELL to use and/or disclose your Protected Health Information (PHI). You also will authorize ShareWELL to obtain your Protected Health Information (PHI) from other covered entities so that we may determine payment of a claim for specified benefits involving you.

I have had full opportunity to read and consider the contents of this authorization, and I understand that, by signing this authorization, I am confirming my authorization of the use and/or disclosure of my Protected Health Information, as described in this authorization

A photocopy of this authorization is as valid as the original, and I and my ShareWELL agent or broker are entitled to receive a copy of this form. A COPY OF THIS AUTHORIZATION IS BEING PROVIDED TO YOU. YOU MAY ALSO REQUEST A COPY OF THE SIGNED AUTHORIZATION FROM US

I certify that the above statements and answers on this claim form are true and correct.

WARNING: Any person who knowingly presents a false or fraudulent claim for payment of a loss or benefit or knowingly presents false information in an application for insurance is guilty of a crime and may be subject to fines and confinement in prison.

fields.name: close_signature
fields.label: Signature
fields.helperText: Sign below. A timestamp and IP hash are recorded with your signature for audit purposes (not full IP storage).

fields.name: prev_intro
fields.label: Preventative intro
fields.contentHtml:
Routine / Preventative

Tell us about a small everyday bill — a routine checkup, lab, vaccine, urgent care visit, or well-woman/well-child visit. We need a proof of service to process this reimbursement.

fields.name: prev_reimbursement_type
fields.label: What kind of reimbursement is this?
fields.helperText: Pick the one that fits. We use this to route your request — if you're not sure, pick the closest match.

options.label: Out-of-network copay (a copay you paid out of pocket)
Preventative service (routine checkup, lab, vaccine, well-visit)

fields.name: prev_provider
fields.label: Find the provider or facility
fields.helperText: Search by last name (for an individual provider) or facility name + your ZIP. Use "Enter manually" if you can't find them.

fields.name: prev_reason
fields.label: Briefly, what was the visit for?
fields.helperText: Optional — "annual physical", "flu shot", "strep test at urgent care", etc.

fields.name: prev_proof_notice
fields.label: Proof of service requirements
fields.contentHtml:
⚠ Proof of service is required. Submitting bills without procedure codes will result in your request being returned and delayed. Acceptable documents are:
  • CMS / HCFA-1500 claim form from your provider (preferred). Submit it exactly as the provider gave it to you.
  • Itemized bill with procedure codes — a line-by-line bill from your provider showing each service, the CPT or procedure code for each line, and the charge.

fields.name: prev_proof_file
fields.label: Upload your proof of service
fields.helperText: Upload your CMS/HCFA-1500 OR an itemized bill that shows each line's CPT/procedure code. PDF, JPG, or PNG.
